calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-16-2024 Off Calendar

Case Summary And Other Matter Supporting Request For Court Judgment On Default
Off Calendar May-03-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar for request for default judgment against Defendant Valley Investments - Redwoods LLC DBA Barnhill Marina and Boatyard.

Dept.505; Judge: Maria Evangelista; Clerk: K. Valdes; Proceedings reported by "For the Record" only to be used in compliance with California Government Code Section 69957, commencing at 9:24:33 a.m. and concluding at 9:30:53 a.m. (D505)

Zvonimir Antony Sola, Esq. appearing for and on behalf of Plaintiff Coxx Wootton Lerner Griffin & Hansen LLP, A limited liability partnership.
Defendant Valley Investments - Redwoods LLC DBA Barnhill Marina and Boatyard not appearing.
Galin Luk, Esq., witness, sworn to testify for the Plaintiff.

Plaintiff's complaint for Breach of Contract and Quantum Meruit filed August 18, 2023.
Proof of personal service as to Defendant on August 22, 2023.
Default entered as to Defendant on October 24, 2023.
Defendant Does 1 through 20 inclusive dismissed on March 26, 2024.
Defendant Narang Amarpal on March 26, 2024.

Counsel to summarize the facts of the case, provide an offer of proof as to witness testimony and exhibits.
Counsel recites on the record the amounts sought.
Plaintiff submits the following exhibits for the Court's review:
Exhibit 1: Retainer
Exhibit 2: invoice
Exhibit 3: email correspondence
Exhibit 4: email correspondence
Exhibit 5: Text Correspondence
Exhibit 6: Correspondence to Defendant.
Witness is called to testify.
Witness confirms that declaration is true and correct.

Upon review of the totality of the evidence admitted to the court, the Court finds that the Plaintiff has met their prima facie case.

The Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant as follows:

The Plaintiff shall recover from Defendant the following:
Damages $54,983.87
Interest $5,408.00
Attorney's Fees $4,875.00
Costs $435.00
Total Judgment $65,701.87

Proposed judgment signed by the Court and executed this day.
